title: add-apt-repository failed due to "File has unexpected size"
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

Podman install fails on Ubuntu 18.0.4

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
echo "deb [trusted=yes] https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/ /" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list
	curl -L https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_${VERSION_ID}/Release.key | sudo apt-key add -
	
	cat /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list
	
	sudo apt-key list 
	
	sudo apt list podman
	
	sudo apt-get update
	
	sudo apt list podman
	
	sudo apt-get install -y podman
	sudo mkdir -p /etc/containers
	sudo cp ${TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR}/cicd-pipeline/resources/registries.conf /etc/containers/
	podman version
	podman info --debug
	apt list podman
```

**Describe the results you received:**

```
sudo apt-get update
Hit:1 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic InRelease
Hit:2 http://ppa.launchpad.net/projectatomic/ppa/ubuntu bionic InRelease
Hit:3 http://apt.postgresql.org/pub/repos/apt bionic-pgdg InRelease
Hit:4 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-updates InRelease
Hit:5 https://public.dhe.ibm.com/software/server/POWER/Linux/toolchain/at/ubuntu bionic InRelease
Hit:6 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-backports InRelease
Hit:7 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic-security InRelease
Get:8 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04  InRelease [1,613 B]
Get:9 https://provo-mirror.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04  Packages [6,325 B]
Err:9 https://provo-mirror.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04  Packages
  File has unexpected size (6320 != 6325). Mirror sync in progress? [IP: 91.193.113.70 443]
  Hashes of expected file:
   - Filesize:6325 [weak]
   - SHA256:c973149d6b71a9c22f063dafb8722230b0cb1161e3564fea686a80bf4362c807
   - SHA1:ca7c9c167a3eb4de9756ec5adce11d58d0a54437 [weak]
   - MD5Sum:a2f401a95d1b522018433803d5c3faac [weak]
  Release file created at: Tue, 26 Oct 2021 14:02:32 +0000
Fetched 1,613 B in 3s (475 B/s)
Reading package lists... Done
E: Failed to fetch https://provo-mirror.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04/Packages.gz  File has unexpected size (6320 != 6325). Mirror sync in progress? [IP: 91.193.113.70 443]
   Hashes of expected file:
    - Filesize:6325 [weak]
    - SHA1:ca7c9c167a3eb4de9756ec5adce11d58d0a54437 [weak]
    - MD5Sum:a2f401a95d1b522018433803d5c3faac [weak]
   Release file created at: Tue, 26 Oct 2021 14:02:32 +0000
E: Some index files failed to download. They have been ignored, or old ones used instead.
```


**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version
Version:            1.6.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.4
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
podman info --debug
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
apt list podman
Listing... Done
podman/bionic,now 1.6.2-1~ubuntu18.04~ppa1 amd64 [installed]
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: Can you update your version of Podman and most likely fuse-overlayfs, to something more recent?

The same install steps were working 5hrs ago which would install:
```
Version:      3.0.1
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.2
Built:        Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
The unexpected size is preventing the podman install of the latest version which is resulting in using the default version on the docker image which is `1.6.2`

I can independently confirm the issue. The package repository at https://provo-mirror.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04 is causing apt-get to fail with a file size mismatch on Package.gz.

The Releases file has these checksums:

```
  Archive: xUbuntu_18.04
  Codename: xUbuntu_18.04
  Origin: obs://build.opensuse.org/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/xUbuntu_18.04
  Label: devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable
  Architectures: amd64
  Date: Thu Oct 14 21:49:17 2021
  Description: Stable Releases of Upstream github.com/containers packages (xUbuntu_18.04)
  MD5Sum:
   66badebcf5fd06b646b989b5d2cabcee 26923 Packages
   44f3969c406d6e26069d8ed4a690d162 6320 Packages.gz
   76d25fcb462e18f826634ca364b3ef8f 20625 Sources
   06ad0e9267a8728814f137efb1e46e2b 5842 Sources.gz
  SHA1:
   7cc1b7569e00c0f6a4bff7e91f714389cb3a947b 26923 Packages
   b3fb21fc9338f54b3b648472944db8066448a18c 6320 Packages.gz
   0c0207cc59d1208a7577a8096a4283338c98b7c5 20625 Sources
   c91f4794cfbc0816b41a117745e420522b3aaf7d 5842 Sources.gz
  SHA256:
   1b901828658221448eb6c630b5e940a20dc1a410120f112de75bf1004c2ea06e 26923 Packages
   4d6d5b823b5ad0fc6405da05d73aa5954f28f11bee22248fe5426841b11c208f 6320 Packages.gz
   25c4673d42c2b5b773708df24d9a4619c3cbfd1a0b1978d654600a84005a36b9 20625 Sources
   83b4751e5c38fd4841ea35960e599e2490ce702aef735745a3ab17025b6445d3 5842 Sources.gz
```

When I download the files directly to my system, the file sizes and the sha256 checksums match what appear
in the Release file. 

```
  -rw-r--r--@ 1 joe  staff  26923 Oct 26 15:58 Packages
  -rw-r--r--@ 1 joe  staff   6320 Oct 26 16:23 Packages.gz

  1b901828658221448eb6c630b5e940a20dc1a410120f112de75bf1004c2ea06e  Packages
  4d6d5b823b5ad0fc6405da05d73aa5954f28f11bee22248fe5426841b11c208f  Packages.gz
```

If I look at the same file on https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/xUbuntu_18.04/Release

```
  Archive: xUbuntu_18.04
  Codename: xUbuntu_18.04
  Origin: obs://build.opensuse.org/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/xUbuntu_18.04
  Label: devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable
  Architectures: amd64
  Date: Tue Oct 26 14:02:32 2021
  Description: Stable Releases of Upstream github.com/containers packages (xUbuntu_18.04)
  MD5Sum:
   447ef3f315b0f3c20143b319489c5f0f 26927 Packages
   a2f401a95d1b522018433803d5c3faac 6325 Packages.gz
   b1d9de675442bd1aa363c5ebc33764a2 20641 Sources
   938553665634dedb6fe9730d1d85260e 5836 Sources.gz
  SHA1:
   779cc0f841bf4cfa88a08eaa9e4c9f89a4f10637 26927 Packages
   ca7c9c167a3eb4de9756ec5adce11d58d0a54437 6325 Packages.gz
   db709b7eb326e35ff7830500f17cc2ee384882eb 20641 Sources
   f1f73e98eeb67224d744ffa62fa5df585aaf61e2 5836 Sources.gz
  SHA256:
   2fbba0b55c01b89052889f03990d4cafbbb093af4773d2bddaf5ea0aca468466 26927 Packages
   c973149d6b71a9c22f063dafb8722230b0cb1161e3564fea686a80bf4362c807 6325 Packages.gz
   3a72f4d82f9e9db819926238eb05f2a58e1b280e3bb5f573432a79864c8c082a 20641 Sources
   4ecb75ad2e376173b7bc2a8e662b713df3c7103f0a09383e603e07e2b8c1a6f6 5836 Sources.gz
```

I can see they are different. Timestamps on these files are 2021-10-26 whereas on the provo-mirror, the timestamps are 2021-10-14. It seems like a repository mirror not getting synced?  Apt-get is pulling down the new metadata but the mirror doesn't have the same?

@missdoor we don't support 18.04 anymore. See: https://podman.io/blogs/2021/03/02/podman-support-for-older-distros.html

For Ubuntu, I would highly recommend using the latest 21.10 which has podman in the default distro repos itself. If you need ubuntu lts with podman, please use 20.04 with the Kubic repo that you used for 18.04 but with `s/18.04/20.04/g` . The kubic packages don't receive nearly as much testing as the packages in the default repos, which is why I wouldn't recommend kubic packages for prod. The upcoming Ubuntu 22.04 LTS would have podman in its base repos.

For 18.04, I guess your only option would be to build from source.

Closing.

@lsm5 Debian 11 is supported, right? I'm getting the same problem there. I suspect @jholloway7 is right about a mirror not getting synced. Here is a Dockerfile you can build to reproduce the problem.

```
FROM debian:bullseye-slim

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install wget gnupg ca-certificates
RUN wget -O kubic_release.key https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_11/Release.key && gpg -o /usr/share/keyrings/kubic.gpg --dearmor kubic_release.key
RUN echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/kubic.gpg] https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_11/ /' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubic_libcontainers_debian.list
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get -y --no-install-recommends -t Debian_11 install containernetworking-plugins fuse-overlayfs podman slirp4netns uidmap
```
